posts.author: TrainingWorkPerfect (Training)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m the monday.com training specialist @ Work Perfect. I’m hosting a FREE Advanced Training which covers all about Dashboards on 29th June 1pm AEST- join me if you’re looking to learn about Dashboards on monday.com!

In Dashboards Training, you’ll take the reins of a fictional company, building dashboards to help you see the big picture and make data-driven decisions.
You’ll learn how to create easy-to-read visualisations using:

  • Dashboard widgets
  • Gantt charts
  • Pivot boards
  • Workload
  • and more

Register using this link : WP Advanced Training Registration 2023
